description_long: This object is a modern over-ear headset with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a broad, white headband and large, cushioned black ear cups. The ear cups are circular and appear to be made of a soft, padded material for comfort during extended use. Attached to one side is a slim, angular microphone boom, suggesting the headset is designed for communication or gaming. The headband is smooth and slightly arched, providing a secure fit over the head. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of plastic and synthetic materials, and the design is both functional and stylish. The headset lacks visible branding or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A sleek, modern over-ear headset with a white headband, black cushioned ear cups, and an attached microphone boom. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for communication or gaming.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white headband, black ear cups, and the microphone boom extending forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical black ear cups and the inner padding, with the headband arching above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the microphone boom visible, mirroring the features of the first side.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the microphone boom and the curvature of the headband.
